## What changed

Describe the user-visible and technical change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:website` when website or shared assets change
- [ ] `npm run test:skill`
- [ ] Theme changes pass `--strict-assets`
- [ ] Install/apply/restore behavior was checked for each declared platform

## Rights and safety

- [ ] New assets include complete provenance and redistribution terms
- [ ] No credentials, chats, account data, or private customer uploads are included
- [ ] The signed Codex application is not modified
